description: Complex reasoning task — does the model leak thinking blocks into content or tool arguments?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Think carefully about the best approach, then use tools to implement it.

I have a performance issue. The function in main.py might be slow because it reads the entire file on every call. Should I add caching or rewrite it to stream? Check the file first, then make whichever change you think is better.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

function.name: edit
function.description: Replace an exact string in a file (first occurrence).

expect.notes: Check: (1) does <think> or <|thinking|> appear in content? (2) in tool arguments? (3) is completion_tokens >> visible content length (hidden thinking)? The ambiguous task is designed to trigger reasoning in thinking-enabled models.
